title: Cubis Foundry Skill Frontmatter
description: Validates YAML frontmatter in SKILL.md files against the Agent Skills open standard (agentskills.io) with Cubis Foundry extensions.

name.description: Lowercase kebab-case skill identifier (max 64 chars). Must match the directory name. No consecutive hyphens, must not start or end with a hyphen.

description.description: What the skill does and when to use it (max 1024 chars). Include 3-5 trigger phrases for routing accuracy.

license.description: License name or reference to a bundled license file (e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0, 'Proprietary. LICENSE.txt has complete terms').

compatibility.description: Environment requirements: intended platforms, system packages, network access (e.g. 'Claude Code, Codex, GitHub Copilot, Gemini CLI').

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value mapping for additional metadata not defined by the Agent Skills spec.

allowed-tools.description: Space-delimited list of pre-approved tools the skill may use (experimental). E.g. 'Bash(git:*) Bash(jq:*) Read'.
